# AI Tools Directory
> Expert reviews and comparisons of the best AI tools for writing, design, coding, marketing, SEO, video, voice, and music.

## About
AI Tools Directory provides hands-on, unbiased reviews of AI-powered software tools. Each tool is tested for a minimum of two weeks before review. All reviews are updated monthly.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://aitoolsdirectory.com/
- All Reviews: https://aitoolsdirectory.com/reviews/ (54+ tools)
- Blog: https://aitoolsdirectory.com/blog/blog.html
- Comparisons: https://aitoolsdirectory.com/comparisons/comparisons.html
- About: https://aitoolsdirectory.com/about.html

## Content Guidelines
- All reviews are based on minimum 2 weeks of hands-on testing
- Reviews are updated monthly
- Affiliate links are marked with rel="sponsored"
- Content is available in English and Turkish
- RSS feed available at: https://aitoolsdirectory.com/feed.xml
